Who We Are

Atlantic Canada’s
Event Enhancement Experts

Events AddOn is your full-service event enhancement partner — based in Halifax and New Glasgow, Nova Scotia, serving all of Atlantic Canada. We supply, coordinate, and operate the visual, audio, and experiential elements that transform an ordinary gathering into a professionally executed, unforgettable experience.

From LED displays that give any space a premium look, to cinematic 360° booths and interactive magic mirrors — everything is managed by one expert team.

+1 (902) 996-2200 Get a Quote
What We Offer

Our Products & Services

Everything your event needs — delivered by one expert team.

LED Poster Displays
Sleek 6ft floor-standing LED pillars. Ultra-fine P1.86 pixel pitch. Perfect for events, exhibitions, malls & showrooms. Monthly rental available.
LED Video Walls
Full-colour LED walls up to 160 sq ft. Stage backdrops, conference screens & sponsor displays. Live camera feeds supported.
360° Video Booth
Cinematic slow-motion 360° rotating arm. Instant social sharing via QR. Custom branded overlays on every clip.
Magic Mirror Photo Booth
Full-length interactive touchscreen. Instant prints & digital delivery. Your logo on every photo. Red-carpet experience.
Audio & Sound
Full PA systems, wireless mics, DJ decks for events 50 to 10,000+ guests. Professional on-site technician included.
Stage & Event Lighting
Uplighting, moving heads, cold sparks & gobo projections. Bundle with any LED display or photo booth service.
WeddingsCorporate ConferencesReligious EventsExhibitions & ExposMalls & ShowroomsCultural EventsGalas & Award ShowsNon-Profit Events
Featured Service

LED Poster Display —
Sleek. Vivid. Versatile.

The P1.86 LED Poster Display is the most versatile display technology available today. A slim, free-standing 6-foot pillar that delivers brilliant full-colour visuals at any event, venue, or commercial space. Multiple units link side-by-side to create stunning entrance walls and sponsor zones.

Replaces static banners with vivid dynamic content updated in seconds
Creates premium first impression — guests notice it the moment they arrive
No laptop needed — WiFi, USB & HDMI allow instant wireless management
Linkable units create large-scale entrance walls for conferences & expos
Pixel Pitch
P1.86 — Ultra-Fine
Display Size
2ft × 6.3ft
Connectivity
WiFi · USB · HDMI
LED Lifespan
100,000 hrs (11+ yrs)
Enquire About LED Poster Displays
Monthly Rental Program

For Malls, Showrooms & Commercial Spaces

No large upfront investment. We deliver, install & manage everything — premium professional look from day one, with the option to generate monthly ad revenue.

Malls & Commercial Corridors
Turn Foot Traffic Into Revenue

A single LED Poster Display generates monthly ad revenue from neighbouring tenants — covering the rental cost and creating a profit centre. Sell 4–5 ad slots per screen.

Car Dealerships & Showrooms
Premium Customer Experience

Dynamic displays showcasing vehicle inventory & brand content — commanding attention from the street. Update from your phone instantly. No large upfront investment.

Monthly Rental. Zero Hassle.

We deliver, install, configure & train your team. You focus on customers — we handle everything.

4–5
Ad Slots/Screen
Monthly
Ad Revenue
2-Year
Warranty
11+ yrs

Photo Experiences

Moments Your Guests Remember Forever

360° Video Booth

Every Guest, A Star.

Cinematic slow-motion 360° video captures every angle. Instant social sharing via QR. Custom branded overlays on every clip. Every video becomes social media marketing that outlasts the event.

Slow-motion 360° rotating arm with professional ring lighting
Instant QR sharing — guests post to Instagram & TikTok immediately
Custom branded video overlays on every clip
Dedicated on-site attendant throughout the event
Book the 360° Booth
Magic Mirror Photo Booth

Touch. Pose. Print.

The Magic Mirror is the centrepiece your guests gather around all evening. Full-length interactive touchscreen — instant prints, digital delivery, your custom branding on every image.

Instant print delivery — guests leave with a physical keepsake
Digital delivery via SMS or QR — instant sharing to any device
Custom branded overlays — event name, logo & date on every photo
On-site attendant included for the full event duration
Book the Magic Mirror
